headline: Deal Dispatch: McCormick, Unilever Merge, Sysco Acquires Jetro Restaurant Depot For $29 Billion, QVC Considers Bankruptcy
summary: Major M&A deals this week include: Eli Lilly's $7.8 billion purchase of Centessa Pharmaceuticals; Meanwhile, IO Biotech goes bankrupt.

headline: Jim Cramer on McCormick & Company: “Stock Just Doesn’t Entice”
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) is among the stocks in focus as Jim Cramer highlighted a market yearning for the status quo ante. Cramer discussed the company’s deal with Unilever during the episode, as he commented: Sometimes, a group is just so hated that it doesn’t matter what any of its members do. You know […]

headline: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
